title: 2PCS Metal Pressed Flower Frame, 2 Gold Photo Frame 20x15cm with 2 Dried Flowers and 2 Tweezers, Tabletop Double Glass Frames for Pressed Flowers Floating Frames for Display DIY Photo Specimen
features: 【Complete DIY Pressed Flower Kit】This gold photo frames set includes 2 elegant gold frames, 2 unique dried flower sheets, and 2 tweezers for effortless DIY crafting. Each gold frame measures 20x15cm (8"x6"), perfectly showcase the beauty of an embossed plant. The flowers appear to float within the frame, creating a stunning visual display that adds a touch of nature’s charm to your home.

【Premium Metal & Glass Construction】Crafted with a durable metal frame and high-quality glass, these vintage photo frame combine elegance with resilience. The shimmering gold finish enhances their sophistication, while the sturdy design prevents bending or breakage. The dual-pane glass securely holds your keepsakes, ensuring long-lasting preservation.

【Versatile Display for Cherished Memories】Transparent gold picture frame embedded with 2 pieces of high-definition glass to display and protect your photos, certificates, posters, paintings, paper cuttings, four-leaf clovers, dried flowers, sketches, collages, portraits, feathers, postcards, watercolours, mementos, small artworks and more. If the item moves inside the glass photo frame, we recommend using some floral adhesive or clear tape to secure it.

【Elevate Any Space with Timeless Elegance】Designed to enhance home, office, or gallery wall decor, these glass frame add a refined botanical touch to any setting. The blend of organic floral beauty and metallic gold accents complements modern, rustic, or vintage aesthetics. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, studios, or as a chic office accent.

【Thoughtful Gift for Special Occasions】A heartfelt present for birthdays, Mother’s Day, weddings, anniversaries, or graduations. The romantic and artistic design of glass picture frames makes it a cherished keepsake. Surprise your loved ones with a gift that captures memories in a unique, stylish, and personalized way.
description: Product Name: 6 Gold Double Sided Glass Frame Decor Set Package including: 2 x Glass Photo Frames 2x Pressed Flowers 2x Tweezers Specifications: Product material: Metal Features 1. Showcase your pressed flowers, artwork, cards, and photos in an elegant and unique manner with these frames. Perfect for displaying crafts, DIY dried leaves or flowers, postcards, and pictures. 2. Modern and sleek in design, this metal photo frame is both stylish and practical. It's easy to open and insert pictures, and you have the option to customize the hanging strap to suit your artwork. 3. With an attractive and eye-catching appearance, this floating photo frame with a chain can hold a variety of photo sizes. Ideal for hanging in your home, office, or at an art show. Color: Gold Size: 20x15cm (8x6in) NOTE Measure manually, allow minor errors in size. MOAMUN thanks for your order.
